description_long: This hotel is a prominent structure within a dense urban block, distinguished by its tall, cylindrical tower capped with a dome and a golden ornament at the top. The building is surrounded by several rectangular high-rises, with the hotel itself featuring a smooth, uniform facade and minimal exterior detailing. The dome is a key architectural feature, suggesting a blend of classical and modern influences. The hotel appears to have multiple floors, with small, regularly spaced windows visible on the cylindrical section. The base of the hotel is integrated into the cityscape, with no visible entrance canopy or elaborate ground-level features. The overall color scheme is a muted gray, with the dome and ornament providing subtle contrast.
description: A tall, cylindrical hotel with a domed roof and golden ornament, surrounded by modern high-rises in a dense urban setting. The facade is smooth and gray, with minimal exterior detailing.
description_view_0: The cylindrical hotel with its domed roof and golden ornament is prominent, surrounded by various rectangular buildings; the dome and ornament are clearly visible.
description_view_1: The hotel is seen from the side, with the dome and golden ornament in profile, and the surrounding high-rises more closely packed around it.
description_view_2: The rear of the hotel is visible, with the dome partially obscured by taller rectangular buildings; fewer details of the hotel facade are visible.
description_view_3: The hotel is seen from the opposite side, with the dome and ornament visible, and the surrounding buildings forming a dense urban block.
